## Checklist

- [ ] Skill has `SKILL.md` with valid frontmatter
- [ ] Skill has `README.md` for GitHub browsing
- [ ] Command file exists in `commands/` (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested locally — command runs and produces expected output
- [ ] No hardcoded paths or personal information
- [ ] Updated root README.md (if adding a new skill)
